name: GrowShrinkTag
description: A tag component that visually indicates positive or negative changes with color coding and directional icons.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying percentage changes, growth metrics, or trends.
Positive values show green with up arrow, negative show red with down arrow.
Set showIcon to false to hide directional arrows.

value.description: Numeric value determining color and icon direction.

styling_info.visual_description: A pill-shaped tag with success (green) background for positive values, error (red) for negative, and neutral for zero. Includes up/down arrow icons.

Dont: Don't forget to format values appropriately

Basic.title: Basic

WithoutIcon.title: Without Icon
